UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Felix Group, LLC is present. Represented by Jessleigh Bartley.
Attorney Marina Franco for the plaintiff.
Defendant Howard Parker is present.
Attorney Anthony Prince for the defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of DEC-05-2016 is vacated. (501)
